import React, { useState } from 'react' import { Card, Rate, Skeleton, Tooltip } from 'antd'; import { EyeFilled, HeartFilled, PlusOutlined } from '@ant-design/icons'; import { TProduct } from '../../Layout/app/Types'; import { Currency } from '../../Layout/app/Const'; const CardProduct = (data:[TProduct]) => { const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false); return (
{data?.off}% off
{data?.name}
200 {Currency} 250{Currency}
) } export default CardProduct
